programs.notes: Cell phone protection; Autograph Card Exclusives; no annual fee; no foreign transaction fees; growing transfer partner roster
programs.category_exceptions: 1x on groceries and general travel; transfer partners limited vs Chase/Amex
programs.redemption_limits: No minimum redemption

programs.known_change_event: Launched March 2024
programs.notes: $50 annual airline statement credit; cell phone protection up to $1,000; Autograph Card Exclusives (live event access); no foreign transaction fees
programs.category_exceptions: 5x only on direct hotel bookings (not via portal); 4x only on direct airline bookings; grocery/gas/streaming earn 1x
programs.redemption_limits: No minimum redemption; transfer to international airline partners only (no US domestic partners)

programs.notes: Annual free night cert (Cat 1-4); up to 5 Category 1-7 free night cert with $50k spend; Discoverist status; 5 Elite Night Credits/yr toward next tier
programs.category_exceptions: 9x only at Hyatt properties — non-Hyatt hotels earn 1x
programs.redemption_limits: Points don't expire with qualifying activity

programs.notes: Annual free night cert (Cat 1-4, up to 15k pts/night); auto Discoverist status; 2 bonus Qualifying Night Credits per stay; 5 Elite Night Credits/yr toward next status tier
programs.category_exceptions: 4x only at Hyatt-branded properties; non-Hyatt hotel stays earn 1x
programs.redemption_limits: No minimum Hyatt redemption; points don't expire with qualifying activity

programs.notes: Auto Wyndham Gold status; anniversary free night at entry-tier properties; Wyndham Rewards entry card
programs.category_exceptions: 6x only at Wyndham brands (Days Inn, Super 8, Ramada, La Quinta, etc.)
programs.redemption_limits: Points expire 18 months inactivity
